compiled_state.title: RED test: Add fragile severity validation tests to test-validate-review-output.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Modify tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh to add RED test cases for fragile severity:
1. A finding with severity fragile passes code-review-dispatch validation
2. A fragile finding in a dimension with score 3 passes score-severity consistency
3. A fragile finding in a dimension with score 4 fails score-severity consistency
4. Integration: pipe a fragile finding through write-reviewer-findings.sh directly and assert success

Test approach: Create JSON fixtures with severity fragile, pipe through validate-review-output.sh code-review-dispatch and write-reviewer-findings.sh, assert exit codes.

All tests must FAIL (RED) against the current validate-review-output.sh.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 3 new test functions for fragile severity
  Verify: grep -c 'fragile' tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] New fragile tests fail RED against current validate-review-output.sh
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh 2>&1 | grep -q FAIL

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh. Tests: 4 RED tests written, confirmed failing.
comments.author: Test
